rulings.Case Title: JOHN ARMOR VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS THE ORIGINATOR
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to Bank of America for Plaintiff to allege tender and/or exemption from tender requirement as to allegedly disputed portion of the debt; and allege facts showing that Bank of America is debt collector. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to RECONTRUST, no opposition. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: GARY STRENG VS. KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 2 - Defendants Keynote Properties, Robert Camozzi and Alvin Baum Jr.'s Demurrer To Complaint. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to causes of action 1-10 to allege facts, not conclusions, showing existence of land-lord tenant relationship; facts showing outrageous behavior. OVERRULED as to 11th cause of action, Demurrer is improper means to address irrelevant and improper allegations. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN VALDEZ-MADRANOS VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 3 - Plaintiff Carmen Valdez-Madranos' Motion To Quash Subpoenas. Plaintiff's Motion to Quash Subpoenas is DENIED. Defendant's Motion to Compel is GRANTED. No sanctions. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID D CANON VS. NORRIS DAN WALTER DELANY AKA DAN W. DELANY AKA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT DAN DELANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Defendant failed to show that all 22 lines of paragraphs 16 and 17 are improper or irrelevant as to the causes of action for negligence and violation of B&P Code 17200 and/or 17500. =(501AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID D CANON VS. NORRIS DAN WALTER DELANY AKA DAN W. DELANY AKA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT DAN DELANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED. To the extent causes of action are alleged as personal injury, allegations are sufficient; to the extent causes of action are subject to CCP 425.10(a), damages are limited to $150,000 as explained in Plaintiff's opposition. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: GEN SHIBAYAMA et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to May 13, 2013. Parties to comply with SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C no later than May, 3 2013. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: KELLY ENSIGN VS. EQUITY RESIDENTIAL PROPERTIES CORP., et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Strike Portion Of Pltf'S 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MGMT, LLC's Motion To Strike Portion Of Plaintiff'S 1st Amended Complaint. Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Defendant's motion raises an issue of fact that is premature at this state of litigation. Additionally, the contract and all limitations contained therein is attached to the First Amended Complained and incorporated by reference. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DIONE POE et al VS. LAWRENCE CHOY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANTs LAWRENCE CHOY and CHRISTINA SUTTON's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to causes of action (1) 1st, for negligence, to allege harm to named Plaintiffs and/or join "Paredes" as plaintiff and to allege terms of the alleged oral agreement; (2) 2nd and 3rd, for breach of covenant of habitability and quiet enjoyment, to allege terms of the alleged oral agreement, other wise OVERRULED; (3) 8th, for fraud, to allege all elements with requisite particularity. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to causes of action 4, 5, 6, 7, and 9 - Plaintiff failed to address arguments raised by the demurrer in its opposition, conceding their merit. (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ZHUO HUI HUANG VS. LINDA WILSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT LINDA WILSON's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal filed April 10, 2013. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASOCIATION VS. RANDALL B ALLISON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 9 - PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N. A.s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to April 18, 2013. Plaintiff's request for judicial notice is GRANTED. Defendants shall file a sur-rely no later than April 16, 2013. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LEONA T. FONG VS. SERGIO SILVA LAINEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 10 - DEFENDANTS SERGIO LAINEZ, MAGALY SILVA, SERGIO SILVA, PRISCILLA SILVA and MAGALY SILVA's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs. Defendants' Motion for Attorney's Fees is continued to April 12, 2013 per April 10, 2013 ex-parte order.

rulings.Case Title: MARITSA DI MEGLIO VS. JUSTINN ROGERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 11 - DEFENDANTS JUSTINN ROGERS and DANIEL HENRY's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendants' Motion to Set Aside Judgment. Hearing Required (1) D Henry to provide declaration from emergency doctor identifying time of intake; (2) D Rogers to provide doctor's declaration regarding her condition. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: FLORENCE FUNG VS. OSCAR CEDILLOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 12 - DEFENDANT OSCAR CEDILLOS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for unlawful detainer against named Defendant. Complaint is not unintelligible. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DEUSTCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. ANA MILAYRO SARAVIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 13 - PLAINTIFF DEUSTCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Hearing required to address sufficiency of responses. Defendant's counsel shall provide proof of service of discovery responses. Defendant's request to be relieved from admissions being deemed admitted is granted. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DEUSTCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. ANA MILAYRO SARAVIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft To Provide Responses To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 13 - PLAINTIFF DEUSTCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Responses To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Hearing required to address sufficiency of responses. Defendant's counsel shall provide proof of service of discovery responses. Defendant's request to be relieved from admissions being deemed admitted is granted. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DEUSTCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. ANA MILAYRO SARAVIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Amdotion To Compel Deft To Provide Responses To Pltf'S Demand For Inspection Of Documents (Set One) And To Produce All Responsive Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 13 - PLAINTIFF DEUSTCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Responses To Plaintiff'S Demand For Inspection Of Documents (Set One) And To Produce All Responsive Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Hearing required to address sufficiency of responses. Defendant's counsel shall provide proof of service of discovery responses. Defendant's request to be relieved from admissions being deemed admitted is granted. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES VS. ADAM GROSSMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2013, line 14 - DEFENDANT ADAM GROSSMAN's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is DENIED. Proof of Service by registered process service re: substitute service. =(501/AJR)
